mapper.sql: id, user_id, coach_name, coach_code, coach_level, specialty, experience_years, certification, hourly_rate, rating, total_reviews, total_students, avatar, phone, email, introduction, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE coach_code = #{coachCode} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_coach
user_id = #{userId}, coach_name = #{coachName}, coach_code = #{coachCode}, coach_level = #{coachLevel}, specialty = #{specialty}, experience_years = #{experienceYears}, certification = #{certification}, hourly_rate = #{hourlyRate}, rating = #{rating}, total_reviews = #{totalReviews}, total_students = #{totalStudents}, avatar = #{avatar}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, introduction = #{introduction}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rating DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE coach_level = #{coachLevel} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rating DESC
SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rating DESC
SELECT FROM t_coach WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rating DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_coach WHERE is_deleted = 0
